title: Agent CLI Gateway RPC Turn
objective: Send a simple user message through `openclaw agent` without `--local`, measuring the CLI client path that crosses the Gateway agent RPC boundary. This is CLI surface coverage, not the primary direct Gateway/session benchmark.

phases.title: Provision Gateway Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw env without starting the gateway yet so Kova auth is applied before the gateway process boots.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the gateway after auth/provider config is already present in the OpenClaw home.

phases.title: Gateway-Backed Agent CLI Turn
phases.intent: Send a user message through the Gateway-backed OpenClaw agent CLI path and keep that CLI cost separate from direct Gateway/session benchmarks.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --agent main --session-id kova-agent-gateway-rpc --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Post-Agent Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the Gateway RPC agent turn.
